tr.td: Primary Opcode for JZ (Jump if Zero)

ol.li: patch_loc: Points specifically to the start of the 4-byte displacement field (offset 2).
Relative Base: The CPU calculates the target as RIP + rel32. Since RIP points to the next instruction after execution starts, the base address for the calculation is patch_loc + 4.
Endianness: Displacement must be written in Little-Endian format in the emitter buffer.
Range: If target_addr - (patch_loc + 4) exceeds 0x7FFFFFFF, the compiler must throw a displacement overflow error.

p.em: rip-relative base is the end of the instruction (4 bytes past patch_loc).

g.text: Emit x86 JZ (rel32) prefix and opcode
